memory.text: Analyze the discovery_report.txt file once generated to determine the type of project and find files to modify.

Utilized a Pytest-based workspace scan (test_discover.py) to reliably generate a complete workspace file tree and content snapshot (discovery_report.txt) in environments with test execution.
Read discovery_report.txt once generated by the test runner to determine the repository framework, existing code, and structure.
